ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "title_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the film in millions of dollars */,
  "gross" INTEGER /* Box office gross of the film in millions of dollars */,
  "profit" INTEGER /* Profit of the film in millions of dollars */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the film (e.g., R, PG, G) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the film */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's poster */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary or synopsis of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "actor_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the actor */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "instagram_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Instagram followers */,
  "twitter_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Twitter followers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_actors" (
  "film_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-actor relationship */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "actor_order" INTEGER /* Order of the actor in the film's cast (1 for lead role, 2 for supporting, etc.) */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_actors_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "votes_3044F" REAL /* Average rating from 30-44 year-olds */,
  "votes_45A" REAL /* Average rating from 45-54 year-olds */,
  "votes_45AM" REAL /* Average rating from 45-54 year-old males */,
  "votes_45AF" REAL /* Average rating from 45-54 year-old females */,
  "votes_1000" REAL /* Average rating from top 1000 users */,
  "votes_US" REAL /* Average rating from US users */,
  "votes_nUS" REAL /* Average rating from non-US users */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the film */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_rating" REAL /* Rotten Tomatoes rating of the film */,
  "metacritic_score" INTEGER /* Metacritic score of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_countries" (
  "film_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-country relationship */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_countries_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating (e.g., R, PG, G) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_content_ratings" (
  "film_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-content rating relationship */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_content_ratings_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES content_ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_content_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, marketer, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "screenplay_writer" TEXT /* Name of the screenplay writer */,
  "cinematographer" TEXT /* Name of the cinematographer */,
  "editor" TEXT /* Name of the editor */,
  "production_designer" TEXT /* Name of the production designer */,
  "music_composer" TEXT /* Name of the music composer */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "production_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for production */,
  "production_location" TEXT /* Primary location of production */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for marketing */,
  "marketing_strategy" TEXT /* Marketing strategy used */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "release_platform" TEXT /* Platform of release (e.g., cinema, streaming) */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release (e.g., theatrical, direct-to-streaming) */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the production */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "screenplay_writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screenplay writer */,
  "cinematographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematographer */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor */,
  "production_designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production designer */,
  "music_composer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music composer */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current status of the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_production_cinematographer_id FOREIGN KEY ("cinematographer_id") REFERENCES cinematographers ("cinematographer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_production_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_production_production_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_designer_id") REFERENCES production_designers ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_production_screenplay_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("screenplay_writer_id") REFERENCES screenplay_writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_production_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("production_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_production_music_composer_id FOREIGN KEY ("music_composer_id") REFERENCES music_composers ("composer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_production_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer (on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "reviewer_type" TEXT /* Type of reviewer (e.g., critic, audience) */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, publication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the producer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the distributor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the production company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the production company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screenplay_writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screenplay writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the screenplay writer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the screenplay writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the screenplay writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the screenplay writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cinematographers" (
  "cinematographer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cinematographer */,
  "cinematographer_name" TEXT /* Name of the cinematographer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the cinematographer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the cinematographer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the cinematographer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cinematographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "editor_name" TEXT /* Name of the editor */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the editor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the editor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Name of the production designer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the production designer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the production designer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the production designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "music_composers" (
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music composer */,
  "composer_name" TEXT /* Name of the music composer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the music composer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the music composer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the music composer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composer_id")
)
